arguments.old_string:
- area: ext_authz
  change: |
    Handle ``append_action`` from :ref:`external authorization service <envoy_v3_api_msg_service.auth.v3.CheckResponse>`
    that was ignored.

removed_config_or_runtime:
arguments.new_string:
- area: ext_authz
  change: |
    Handle ``append_action`` from :ref:`external authorization service <envoy_v3_api_msg_service.auth.v3.CheckResponse>`
    that was ignored.
- area: udp
  change: |
    Fixed UDP proxy filter crash when a pre-existing cluster is updated via CDS (e.g., HostSet changes).
    Previously, cluster updates would silently fail and leave stale cluster references in the cluster info map.

removed_config_or_runtime:
